final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the circuit outputs 'v' based on the XOR of all inputs, which is not the case.
module logic_circuit (
    input x,
    input y,
    input z,
    input w,
    output reg v);assign v = x&~y&~z&w | x&y&~z&~w | x&~y&z&~w | x&y&z&w;

endmodule
